question: Did Mantle's RWA growth actually accelerate in Q2 2026, and are tokenized-equity adoption claims supported onchain?

claims.text: Mantle RWA TVL reached $247.5M as of June 2026, up 27% on the quarter.
Tokenized-equity volume on Mantle reached $12M, evidencing real distribution beyond issuance.
InsightX may drive future AI-native prediction-market adoption on Mantle.
